business.name: King Auto Repair

business.hours: Mon–Fri: 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Sat: 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM

seo.title: King Auto Repair | Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: King Auto Repair offers expert auto repair and maintenance in Dallas, TX. From brake service to engine diagnostics, we keep your car running smoothly. Call (214) 660-1144 today!

hero.headline: Professional Auto Repair & Maintenance in Dallas
hero.subheadline: Reliable, honest, and skilled mechanics dedicated to keeping your vehicle safe and performing at its best.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair for All Makes & Models
featureSections.body: From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, our ASE-certified technicians handle it all. We use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to quickly identify issues and get you back on the road safely.
featureSections.cardBody: We use only high-quality OEM and trusted aftermarket parts to ensure durability and performance.

featureSections.title: Transparent Communication & Fair Pricing
featureSections.body: We believe in upfront pricing and clear explanations. No hidden fees, no upsells — just honest advice and expert work. You'll always know what's needed and why.
featureSections.cardBody: Our work is backed by a comprehensive warranty, so you can drive with confidence.

whyChooseUs.title: ASE-Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds industry-leading certifications and undergoes continuous training to stay ahead of the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast & Reliable Service
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your time. Most repairs are completed same-day, and we offer shuttle service and loaner vehicles to minimize disruption.

whyChooseUs.title: Honest, No-Pressure Approach
whyChooseUs.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our goal is to build long-term relationships based on trust and quality.

whyChooseUs.title: Advanced Diagnostic Equipment
whyChooseUs.description: We invest in the latest diagnostic tools to accurately pinpoint issues, saving you time and money on guesswork.

testimonials.quote: King Auto Repair saved me hundreds compared to the dealership. They were upfront about everything and had my car ready the same day. I won't go anywhere else!
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: I’ve been bringing my SUV here for years. The team is friendly, knowledgeable, and always explains what’s needed. They’ve earned my complete trust.
testimonials.author: Linda S.

testimonials.quote: After a bad experience at another shop, I was nervous. King Auto was honest, fair, and did great work. My car runs better than ever.
testimonials.author: James T.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience the King Auto Difference?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and see why Dallas drivers trust us with their vehicles.

servicesPage.intro: At King Auto Repair, we offer a complete range of automotive services to keep your vehicle running smoothly and safely. From routine maintenance to major repairs, our certified technicians have you covered.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert repairs for all engine issues.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car isn't performing as it should, our advanced diagnostic tools quickly pinpoint the problem. We repair everything from minor sensor issues to major engine overhauls, using quality parts and proven techniques.
benefits: Peace of mind with a warranty

process.title: Comprehensive Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read error codes and gather data.

process.title: Thorough Inspection
process.description: Our technician performs a visual and mechanical inspection to confirm the issue.

process.title: Repair & Testing
process.description: We complete the repair using quality parts and test-drive your car to ensure everything is perfect.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on the complexity of the issue.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on engine repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our engine repairs come with a parts and labor warranty for your peace of mind.

services.title: Brake Service & Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your brakes responsive and reliable with our expert service.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most important safety feature. We inspect, repair, and replace brake pads, rotors, calipers, and lines to ensure optimal stopping power. Whether you're hearing squeaks or feeling vibrations, we'll restore your brakes to like-new condition.
benefits: Prevention of rotor and caliper damage

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We check pad thickness, rotor condition, fluid levels, and brake lines.

process.title: Component Replacement
process.description: We replace worn parts with high-quality OEM or premium aftermarket components.

process.title: System Test
process.description: We test the brakes on the road to confirm proper function and no noises.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We'll inspect them at every visit.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake trouble?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, a soft pedal, or vibrations when braking are all signs you need service.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes and inspections.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the simplest way to extend your engine's life. We use high-quality synthetic and conventional oils and include a multi-point inspection with every service to catch small issues before they become big problems.

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We drain the old oil and replace the oil filter.

process.title: Refill with Fresh Oil
process.description: We add the correct grade and amount of oil for your vehicle.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check fluids, belts, hoses, tires, and lights to ensure everything is in good shape.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need oil changes every 5,000 to 7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual for specifics.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both conventional and synthetic oil options to match your vehicle's requirements.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Stay comfortable year-round with expert climate control service.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all components of your vehicle's climate control system, including compressors, condensers, evaporators, and blower motors. We'll have you comfortable again in no time.

process.title: System Diagnosis
process.description: We test pressures, temperatures, and electrical components to find the root cause.

process.title: Repair or Replace
process.description: We repair or replace faulty parts using quality components.

process.title: Performance Check
process.description: We verify the system blows cold/hot air and operates efficiently.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a leak. We can diagnose and fix it.

faqs.question: How often should I service my car's AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years to ensure proper performance and catch issues early.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Auto Repair Shop Since 2008
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our customers safe and satisfied, building lasting relationships through transparency and expertise.
story: King Auto Repair was founded in 2008 with a simple mission: provide Dallas drivers with reliable, honest auto repair at fair prices. Owner Mike King, an ASE Master Technician with over 20 years of experience, saw too many customers being overcharged or misled by other shops. He set out to create a different kind of repair shop—one where integrity comes first.

Over the years, King Auto Repair has grown from a small two-bay garage to a full-service facility serving thousands of satisfied customers. We've invested in the latest diagnostic technology and ongoing training for our team, but our core values remain the same: treat every customer like family and never recommend a repair that isn't needed.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car truly needs—nothing more, nothing less.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We value your time and your trust, and we communicate clearly every step of the way.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Dallas and give back through local sponsorships and events.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with King Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? We're here to help.
